Container.Name: activitywatch-server
Container.Overview: ActivityWatch central aggregator (aw-server-rust). Read-only unified UI; the companion activitywatch-sync container imports each device's synced sqlite files. The REST API has no auth, so this is reached only through Caddy/Authentik on an internal docker network - do NOT publish port 5600 to the host or internet. The image CMD already starts `aw-server --host 0.0.0.0`.
